creator: empty.japan
caption:
I have never done this before… it was my first time and I will never do it again. I am talking about Omikuji (おみくじ) - a way of Japanese fortune-telling commonly found at Shinto shrines and Buddhist temples that predicts the reader’s luck and future. And I really don’t like this idea 😅 You might disagree with me, but I do not enjoy the idea of being told whether I will be lucky or not in the future. But I had to do it for a travel guide I am making and hey… It actually was fun, especially considering that I drew the 大吉 - Excellent luck 🤣🍀 Do you like the idea of being told if you will be lucky or not?
📍 Kifune Shrine in Kyoto
